# Transcrição: 19. Show them on a Magazine

- **Fonte:** 19. Show them on a Magazine
- **Duração:** 00:53

---

## [00:00 - 00:53]

Everybody wants to be on the front of a magazine. Everybody. Don't kid yourself. Everybody wants to be on a billboard, side of a bus, or on a magazine. So what you can simply do is Photoshop their image on the front of GQ Times, Fortune, Smart Money. Take any of these major recognized names. Take in Photoshop their photo on there. Or send them a photo in a frame with them on the front of one of these magazines. This is a very, very smart way to get back in front of a client, okay, to show them how special you want to treat them and how you view them. Think about it. Photoshop. Throw their photo on the cover of a major magazine, okay, as Times Man of the Year, Times Woman of the Year. Put them on the O Magazine. I don't care. Just pull out the stops, get them on the Mac.
